overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school game showing a student in Gryffindor robes walking through the Great Hall decorated for winter with floating candles, house banners, and Christmas trees. The character proceeds down the central aisle, circles the large Christmas tree at the far end, and exits through a large wooden door into a stone corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall central aisle between house dining tables

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central aisle toward the large Christmas tree at the far end of the hall, passing students seated at long dining tables

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating in mid-air beneath the enchanted ceiling
long wooden dining tables with students seated and eating
long wooden dining tables with golden tableware and food
blue and bronze house banners hanging from the high ceiling
tall arched stained glass windows letting in natural light
massive decorated Christmas tree with ornaments at the far end of the hall
thick stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a student walking down the central aisle of a vast Gothic dining hall. Floating candles illuminate the space above long house tables where other students are seated eating. The camera moves steadily forward toward a large Christmas tree at the far end, passing stone pillars and beneath hanging house banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: Front of Great Hall near the Christmas tree and stone fountain

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the top of the Christmas tree and the floating candles clustered near the ceiling
character turns around 180 degrees to walk back toward the entrance area

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering Christmas tree and floating candles overhead, then turning to walk back along the side of the hall

entered.detail: circular stone fountain base at the foot of the Christmas tree

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the front of the hall and pauses to look up at the massive Christmas tree and the enchanted candles floating near the vaulted ceiling. After a moment of observation, the character turns around and begins walking back along the side of the hall, passing an open book stand.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall side aisle with decorated Christmas trees and house tables

agents.ego_description: walking along the left side of the hall past decorated Christmas trees and the Ravenclaw and Hufflepuff tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at the table eating and conversing with others

entered.detail: pedestal with an open illuminated book and a wreath decoration
smaller Christmas tree decorated with red ornaments and candles along the wall
large golden decorative bowl on a table near the wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along the perimeter of the hall, the camera passes decorated Christmas trees and stone pillars covered in icicle decorations. The character moves past the house tables where students are dining, approaching a large wooden exit door at the far end while floating candles recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Stone corridor with suits of armor

events.description: character opens the large wooden door and exits the Great Hall into a narrow stone corridor
ambient light drops significantly as the character moves from the candlelit hall into the dim corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the large carved wooden door, opening it, and stepping into the stone corridor beyond

entered.detail: tall carved wooden double doors with metal hinges and handles
medieval suits of armor standing against the stone wall
narrow hallway with stone walls and arched ceilings
ornate red carpet runner on the stone floor of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and opens a large wooden door, transitioning from the grand hall into a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor. The lighting shifts from warm candlelight to cooler, subdued tones as the character walks past suits of armor standing against the walls on a red carpet runner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand, festive dining hall that eventually transitions into a quiet, dimly lit stone corridor. It begins by following a student down the central aisle of a vast Gothic hall, moving beneath floating candles and hanging banners toward a massive Christmas tree at the far end. As the character pauses to observe the enchanted ceiling, the camera pivots and begins a journey back along the perimeter, passing icicle-decorated pillars and dining students. The scene then shifts toward the hall's exit, moving past festive greenery until the character opens a heavy wooden door. Finally, the environment transforms from the warm, golden glow of the Great Hall into the cool, subdued tones of a narrow corridor lined with suits of armor and a red carpet.
